_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Advise trial counsel as technical expert
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing clinical trial databases, including case report form development, edit check logic specification, data validation rules, and the traceability documentation required for regulatory inspection and audit.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Skill AB-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.433), LS-S-010 (LS, cosine: 0.407).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: Moderate similarity (4.5/10). The cross-encoder finds meaningful but bounded overlap — consistent with cross-framework mapping between cybersecurity and data/AI domains where shared governance concepts use different terminology.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: Lower token-level alignment (F1=0.832). The concepts share limited contextual embedding similarity at the token level, consistent with cross-domain vocabulary divergence.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: Neutral-dominant (99.9%). The model finds the descriptions related but neither implying nor contradicting each other — typical for cross-domain framework mapping where concepts overlap without strict logical implication.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder (0.491) closely tracks STS (0.456). The small gap (0.035) indicates the relationship is capturable through independent encoding — shared surface semantics align with cross-attention analysis.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Near-zero lexical overlap (3.1%). The concepts use almost entirely different vocabulary, confirming the relationship is detected through semantic understanding, not word matching.
